originalTitle: Value stocks beat growth when inflation is high. Here are 13 stocks top newsletters are betting on now.
summary: Many portfolio experts are wrong about what drives value outperformance. This single metric explains why.
content: Many portfolio experts are wrong about what drives value outperformance. This single metric explains why.
chineseTitle: 当通胀高企时，价值股跑赢成长股。以下是热门时事通讯目前押注的 13 只股票。
chineseSummary: 许多投资组合专家对于推动价值跑赢的因素的看法是错误的。这个单一指标解释了原因。
chineseContent: 许多投资组合专家对于推动价值跑赢的因素的看法是错误的。这个单一指标解释了原因。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
